data.title: New agency Near&Dear partners with Addyi, offering services in appearance, performance, sexual health, longevity, self-optimization. Los Angeles, Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: A recently established marketing agency, Near&Dear, has surfaced in Los Angeles with a wide-ranging client base that spans across various interconnected sectors including appearance, performance, sexual health, longevity, and self-optimization. The agency is based in Los Angeles and was founded on January 27, 2026. Near&Dear specializes in providing comprehensive marketing services to clients in these diverse categories.
GROUPE PARTOUCHE: Impressive results in 2024/2025 with robust income growth from strategic investments and arbitrage.

data.title: ISA elevates 8 members to Fellow status in 2026, recognizing excellence in automation; John Cusimano Armexa among them.
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, on January 27, 2026, the International Society of Automation (ISA) shared its congratulations for the eight esteemed professionals who have been honored with the title of ISA Fellow in 2026. Among them is John Cusimano Armexa, recognized for his groundbreaking work in cybersecurity. This prestigious designation marks a significant achievement for the selected individuals within the field of automation.

data.title: Mercury Insurance advises on post-storm home protection to prevent water damage. Jan. 27, 2026. NYSE: MCY.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 27, 2026, it was reported that fluctuating temperatures have led to water damage in various parts of the U.S. following a weekend of extreme weather conditions. Local insurance company Mercury Insurance (NYSE: MCY) highlighted the importance of taking early action to reduce water damage and expedite the recovery process. This reminder comes as communities are dealing with the aftermath of snow, ice, and freezing temperatures. The company emphasized the significance of prompt measures to minimize the impact of the weather-related incidents.

data.title: Luka Dončić launches 77X & Fan Pass, offering unique content & experiences for fans. Los Angeles Lakers star.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 27, 2026, Luka Dončić of the Los Angeles Lakers revealed the inception of 77X, a venture dedicated to producing unique entertainment, collectibles, merchandise, and live events for his supporters. Additionally, he introduced Fan Pass, a complimentary membership platform currently accessible for fans to engage with.

data.title: Ekinops partners with NWCCOG to enhance connectivity in NW Colorado. Promotes resilient network solutions.
data.description: In Rockville, Maryland, and Silverthorne, Colorado, a significant partnership was unveiled on January 27, 2026. Ekinops, a prominent provider of optical transport, branch routing, and cybersecurity SASE solutions, has joined forces with the Northwest Colorado Council of Governments (NWCCOG). Ekinops, listed on Euronext Paris under the symbol FR0011466069 (EKI), is known for its expertise in the field. This collaboration marks a significant milestone in the industry, signaling a major development in the realm of technology and government initiatives.

data.title: "SIX STARS, Todd Wiseman Jr.'s action short starring Milo Machado-Graner, out Jan. 27 on Short Frame."
data.description: Following its debut at the HollyShorts festival as the opening night entry at the TCL Chinese Theatre, a thriller set in Florida is now available worldwide on Short Frame, a YouTube channel specializing in showcasing acclaimed short films. Titled SIX STARS, the short film was released on January 27, 2026.

data.title: Frontage Europe relocates bioanalytical lab to Milan, Italy, in a 2,500 sqm facility, expanding capabilities.
data.description: Frontage Europe, a subsidiary of Frontage Laboratories Inc., has announced the relocation of its bioanalytical laboratory to a new 2,500 square meter facility near Milan, Italy. This move is aimed at consolidating all services in one location. The laboratory was previously situated in Exton, Pennsylvania. The new location is expected to enhance operational efficiency and streamline processes for the company. The move was completed on January 27, 2026.

data.title: European Commission approves Guerbet's Elucirem (Gadopiclenol) for children from birth. Global specialist in contrast media and solutions.
data.description: In Villepinte, France on January 27, 2026, Guerbet (FR0000032526 GBT), a leading provider of contrast media and medical imaging solutions worldwide, has received approval from the European Commission for a new indication for its macrocyclic product for children from birth. This development marks a significant milestone for the company as they expand their product offerings to cater to a younger demographic.

data.title: 2026 Official Fairbanks Visitors Guide now available for free from Explore Fairbanks; 72-page, full-color publication for planning trips to Fairbanks, Alaska.
data.description: Fairbanks, Alaska, as of January 27, 2026 - The 2026 Official Fairbanks Visitors Guide has been released by Explore Fairbanks, offering a comprehensive 72-page, full-color guide for free. This guide serves as a valuable tool for organizing a visit to Fairbanks, Alaska, at any point in the year. It provides key information on the city's top attractions, activities, and accommodations. Visitors can now access this essential resource to make the most of their trip to Fairbanks.

data.title: Global Ceramic Matrix Composites market valued at USD 2040 million in 2024; projected to reach USD 3699 million at 9% CAGR by 2031.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of January 27, 2026, the market size for Ceramic Matrix Composites was valued at approximately USD 2040 million globally in 2024. It is projected to grow to around USD 3699 million by 2031, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.0%.

data.title: ConnectM secures $865K Greentech order for Keen heat pumps, pushing total commitments to over $2.6M.
data.description: ConnectM has recently secured a new order for their Keen heat pumps and controls from Greentech, amounting to $865,000. This latest order has increased their total commitments to around $2.6 million, showcasing the growing demand for their products in the market.

data.title: Amazon plans to close Fresh and Go stores, focus on expanding Whole Foods amid a grocery revamp. Stock rises.
data.description: The market witnessed a rise in Amazon's stock following the company's decision to increase its emphasis on the Whole Foods brand and discontinue Fresh operations. In its latest grocery revamp, Amazon plans to close Fresh and Go stores while expanding the reach of Whole Foods. This strategic shift aims to streamline Amazon's grocery services and capitalize on the success of the Whole Foods brand. The move signifies a significant change as Amazon navigates the competitive grocery market. Investors are closely monitoring these developments as Amazon strengthens its position in the industry.

data.title: IonQ acquires SkyWater for $1.8 billion in cash and stock deal, boosting position in quantum computing stocks.
data.description: IonQ, known for its aggressive acquisition strategy in the quantum computing sector, has announced a $1.8 billion purchase of SkyWater through a combination of cash and stock. This acquisition raises questions about the potential returns from IonQ's investment in SkyWater and its impact on the quantum computing stocks market.

data.title: Cloudflare's stock rose due to excitement around AI strategy & partnership with Anthropic, boosting Zoom too.
data.description: Investor enthusiasm drove Cloudflare stock up recently due to the company's focus on artificial intelligence. Their partnership with model builder Anthropic also contributed to the positive market response. This collaboration led to a notable increase in Cloudflare stock, and Zoom similarly received a boost from their partnership with Anthropic. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Corning stock surged as Meta stock dipped following a $6 billion fiber-optic deal agreement between the companies.
data.description: After Corning and Meta Platforms disclosed a $6 billion fiber-optic deal, Corning's stock soared while Meta's stock experienced a slight decline. Corning's shares surged following the announcement of the deal, marking a significant increase in value. On the other hand, Meta's stock saw a modest dip in its value post the deal revelation. This deal is anticipated to have a substantial impact on both companies' future growth and market performance.

data.title: Dow falls as Fed meeting begins. UnitedHealth stock drops on Medicare news. Meta lifts other stocks.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a drop as the Federal Reserve's policy meeting began. There was a significant decrease in UnitedHealth stock following news related to Medicare. The market update included Meta boosting certain stocks. The Investor's Business Daily provided live coverage of these events.

data.title: Intellia Therapeutics stock surged 10% following FDA approval to restart gene-editing study.
data.description: Intellia Therapeutics experienced a significant increase in stock value on Tuesday following the FDA's decision to permit the company to resume a gene-editing study. The company's stock rose by 10% amidst this news, marking a positive development for Intellia Therapeutics as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Micron boosts memory-chip production in Singapore with new facility amid shortage, resulting in stock rise.
data.description: In response to a memory-chip shortage in the industry, Micron recently initiated construction on a new wafer fabrication facility in Singapore. This move led to a notable increase in Micron's stock value. The decision to expand memory-chip production in Singapore comes as a timely response to the heightened demand for chips, with the aim of addressing the shortage. This development signifies a significant milestone for Micron and reflects the company's proactive approach in meeting market demands.

data.title: D-Wave stock surges as Florida Atlantic University signs $20 million deal for quantum computing services.
data.description: Shares of D-Wave saw an increase following the announcement that Florida Atlantic University has entered a contract worth $20 million with the quantum computing company. The surge in stock value was captured under a piece titled "Cloud Computing Stocks: D-Wave Climbs On Florida Atlantic University's Purchase."
